story.so_that: show then display name for promotion types
story.i_want: the system to display display names instead of internal IDs

journey.before: User navigates to the tactics management interface, looking for tactics associated with specific promotion types
journey.during: User searches or filters tactics by promotion type, expecting to see written names in the tactic view, search results table, and filter dropdown
journey.after: User can quickly identify and work with tactics by promotion type without needing to reference ID-to-name mappings

capability_breakdown.core_action: Display promotion type names instead of internal IDs across the UI (tactic view, search results, filter dropdown)
outputs: Written promotion type name displayed in tactic view
Written promotion type name displayed in search results table
Written promotion type name displayed in filter dropdown
state_changes: UI rendering changes to show display_name field instead of ID

api: No API changes required (display_name already available from backend)
database: No database changes required (display_name field already exists)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Promotion type displayed as written name in tactic view
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am a registered Internal Requester When I view a Tactic Then the promotion type is displayed as a written name AND the display name is consistent across all views
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: View promotion type as written name

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Search results table displays promotion types as written names
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am an Internal Requester When I search for tactics Then the search table displays promotion types as written names
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: See promotion type names in search results

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Filter dropdown displays promotion types as written names
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am an Internal Requester When I open the select filter for promotion type Then the filter displays promotion types as written names AND the Search filter works as before
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Filter tactics by written promotion type names

existing_code: Search results table component (display promotion type)
API service that fetches tactics and promotion types

related: Any story related to promotion type management or display
